name: Coursera
collaborationStyle: course recommendation, skill pathway integration, sponsored segment
notes: Strong fit for channels about career development, tech, business, and higher education advice.

name: Skillshare
collaborationStyle: sponsored segment, class launch, creator-led course promotion
notes: Well-known sponsor across YouTube; ideal for creative, design, productivity, and learning channels.

name: Udemy
collaborationStyle: course bundle promotion, skill upgrade content, sponsored recommendations
notes: Great fit for tech, design, marketing, and career skill channels emphasizing self-paced learning.

name: LinkedIn Learning
collaborationStyle: career skill series, professional development content, sponsored call-to-action
notes: Perfect for career, business, and professional development channels.

name: MasterClass
collaborationStyle: self-improvement story, instructor highlight, course integration
notes: Strong for creators focused on self-improvement, creativity, and high-performance skills.

name: edX
collaborationStyle: university-style course recommendations, certificate promotion, upskilling content
notes: Best for creators talking about degree-equivalent skills and formal education alternatives.

name: Duolingo
collaborationStyle: language learning challenges, daily streak content, sponsored segments
notes: A natural fit for language learning, international study, and travel-education crossovers.

name: Rosetta Stone
collaborationStyle: language learning routines, expat stories, travel + language integration
notes: Best for more serious language-learning and expat/immersion education content.

name: Babbel
collaborationStyle: language habits, travel prep, sponsored lesson integrations
notes: Excellent for language channels and travel creators focusing on preparation and local language.

name: Google Career Certificates
collaborationStyle: career change stories, portfolio-building content, sponsored pathways
notes: Perfect for channels about tech career transitions, UX, data analytics, or IT support.

name: Brilliant.org
collaborationStyle: problem-solving demo, math/science integration, sponsored explainer
notes: Great fit for STEM, puzzle, and explainer creators who teach through examples and challenges.

name: Khan Academy
collaborationStyle: mission-driven segment, exam prep integration, educational partnership
notes: Mission-focused; best for exam prep, high school, and foundational education channels.

name: Grammarly
collaborationStyle: writing productivity segment, study workflow, sponsored integration
notes: Fits study-with-me, essay-writing, and productivity channels with a student or professional audience.

name: Chegg / Chegg Study
collaborationStyle: exam prep segment, homework help integration, sponsored tutorial
notes: Best for exam prep, problem-solving, and college-focused education creators.

name: Magoosh
collaborationStyle: test prep strategies, exam walkthroughs, sponsored sections
notes: Strong fit for GRE, GMAT, SAT/ACT, and standardized test prep channels.

name: DataCamp
collaborationStyle: coding challenges, data projects, sponsored course recommendations
notes: Ideal for data science, analytics, and Python/R coding channels.

name: Codecademy
collaborationStyle: intro coding series, sponsored challenges, curriculum integrations
notes: Great fit for coding bootcamp-style creators and dev education channels.

name: Study.com
collaborationStyle: credit-by-exam content, homework help integrations, course recommendations
notes: Fits creators helping students accelerate degrees or pass prerequisite exams.

name: Brilliant for Educators
collaborationStyle: teacher-focused integrations, classroom use cases, sponsored demos
notes: Great for teacher-tube and classroom-focused creators.

name: Mimo / coding apps
collaborationStyle: micro-learning content, app walkthroughs, beginner coding series
notes: Ideal for beginner-friendly coding and tech education channels.

name: Cambly
collaborationStyle: speaking practice content, tutor stories, language challenges
notes: Great for English-learning and speaking-practice education channels.

name: Notion for Students
collaborationStyle: study workflow, note-taking systems, sponsored template
notes: Great for study-tube, note-taking, and academic productivity channels with visual systems.

name: Quizlet
collaborationStyle: flashcard walkthrough, exam revision routine, sponsored study session
notes: Ideal for high school and uni exam prep, language learning, and flashcard-based study creators.

name: Anki
collaborationStyle: spaced repetition tutorials, deck showcases, exam prep content
notes: Perfect for medical, law, and language-learning creators who emphasize spaced repetition.

name: RemNote
collaborationStyle: note-taking workflow, concept map demos, flashcard systems
notes: Great for PKM + study hybrid creators and STEM-heavy audiences.

name: StudySmarter
collaborationStyle: all-in-one study platform demos, exam preparation workflows, schedule planning
notes: Fit for exam-prep and study-with-me channels across subjects.

name: Brainscape
collaborationStyle: flashcard walkthroughs, deck highlight content, sponsored study sessions
notes: Good for study creators who revolve around decks and rapid recall.

name: Forest (study mode)
collaborationStyle: study timer content, focus challenges, aesthetic Pomodoro sessions
notes: Perfect for study-with-me and focus-livestream creators.

name: Language Reactor
collaborationStyle: learning-from-Netflix content, subtitle-based language learning, walkthroughs
notes: Best for language learning creators who use shows and movies as teaching tools.

name: LingQ
collaborationStyle: reading-based language learning, input-heavy workflows, sponsored demos
notes: Ideal for comprehensible input language-learning channels.

name: Busuu
collaborationStyle: language learning routines, B2C course walkthroughs, speaking practice content
notes: Strong fit for language tutors and exam-focused language channels.

name: GoStudent / online tutoring platforms
collaborationStyle: tutoring story content, before/after grade improvements, sponsored call-to-action
notes: Best for K–12 and high school exam prep creators, plus parent-facing education channels.
